items: Labor & delivery room fee (hourly or flat)
Vaginal delivery fee OR C-section fee (not both — common billing error)
OB physician fee (usually billed separately by the doctor)
Anesthesiologist fee (if epidural — also usually separate)
Pitocin (oxytocin) — each bag billed separately. Note the bag size.
Penicillin — each dose billed separately regardless of size
Saline IV bags — verify count matches what you observed
Billed for both vaginal and C-section delivery
Duplicate charges for same medication or supply
Nursery fees for baby rooming-in with mother
Epidural billed as both supply and procedure
Circumcision charged without consent or performed
